source_pr.title: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for explainfor_test.go
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28580 

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: This PR migrates `executor/explainfor_test` (and related executor tests) from legacy gocheck-style suites to testify. Framework migration can reduce flaky suite lifecycle / fixture issues and is often used to bring back previously skipped unstable race tests.
fix_pattern: Migrate legacy gocheck-based executor tests to testify (modern Go `testing.T` patterns), updating suite setup/teardown and assertions.
analysis:
PR title: executor: migrate test-infra to testify for explainfor_test.go
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/32711
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal
Triage summary: - c.Skip("skip race test")
Changed files (2): executor/executor_test.go, executor/explainfor_test.go
Patch url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/32711.patch
Picked test: type=unit path=executor/executor_test.go name=executor_test
